dependencies: Outsourcing of network and security infrastructure to third parties
Data processing operations outsourced to third parties
Cloud-based solutions hosted by third parties
Dependence on Google for cloud platform services
Reliance on data from external sources including credit granting institutions, payroll processors, employers
risks: Third-party vendors failure to perform obligations could impair ability to operate effectively
Outsourcing in developing countries subject to geopolitical uncertainty
Loss of access to credit, employment, financial and other data from external sources
Data sources could withdraw, delay receipt or increase cost of data
Transition to cloud-based technologies may expose to additional cyber threats
Disruption to outsourced systems or communication links could negatively affect operations

regulatory_risks: Fair Credit Reporting Act (FCRA) compliance requirements
Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB) supervisory authority and enforcement actions
Dodd-Frank Act UDAAP provisions
Federal Trade Commission Act enforcement
Gramm-Leach-Bliley Act (GLBA) data protection requirements
Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA) applicability
State data security breach notification laws in all 50 states
New York State Department of Financial Services (NYDFS) cybersecurity rules
California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) and California Privacy Rights Act

State privacy laws in Colorado, Connecticut, Delaware, Florida, Iowa, Montana, Nebraska, New Hampshire, New Jersey, Oregon, Texas, Utah, Virginia, Indiana, Kentucky, Maryland, Minnesota, Rhode Island, Tennessee
State banking and financial services regulatory agency examinations
Financial Conduct Authority (FCA) regulation in UK
EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)
UK equivalent GDPR provisions post-Brexit
Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act (PIPEDA) in Canada
Provincial privacy legislation in Alberta, British Columbia, Quebec
Data protection laws in Argentina, Uruguay, Peru, Costa Rica, Mexico, Brazil
Australian Privacy Principles and Privacy Act 1988
Privacy Act 2020 in New Zealand
Information Technology Act of 2000 in India
Digital Personal Data Protection Act 2023 in India
Credit reporting legislation in Canadian provinces
Artificial intelligence regulation proposals in EU and US states
New regulations on personal financial data rights and open banking (CFPB Section 1033 rule)
CFPB rule requiring removal of medical collection debt from credit reports
Proposed changes to FCRA by CFPB
Federal and state tax law changes affecting Employer Services
Changes to Affordable Care Act employer mandate
E-Verify and immigration work authorization requirements

sanction_risks: Restrictions on import and export of technologies
Geopolitical instability including terrorism and war
Business licensing requirements or restrictions relating to foreign direct investments
Varying business practices and corruption levels in international markets
Argentina deemed highly inflationary economy with peso devaluation
Completed sale of joint venture in Russia in 2022
